title: [sub2api] Multi-group API key runtime fix for invite-login
description:
Focused execution lane for fixing Sub2API so invite-login returns one single `api_key` usable across multiple provider families/groups without requiring a default group selection.

Execution source-of-truth plan:
- docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-07-sub2api-multigroup-apikey-runtime-plan.md

Confirmed root cause before execution:
1. New bootstrap keys are not materializing usable multi-group persistence in runtime DB as expected (`api_key_groups` empty for newly created bootstrap keys).
2. API key auth and gateway runtime still depend heavily on `apiKey.Group` / `apiKey.GroupID`, so default-group semantics still leak into request-time routing.
3. Bootstrap target selection currently under-selects provider families (notably `gemini`, and `antigravity` can be filtered out by current representative-group rules).

Execution scope:
- Fix `GrantedGroupIDs` persistence into runtime DB.
- Fix API key auth/cache hydration so granted groups become runtime source-of-truth.
- Fix request-time routing so one key can be used across multiple groups/provider families without end-user default-group selection.
- Fix invite bootstrap selection so all intended provider families are included.
- Finalize invite-login response contract to return only one `api_key` (no `bootstrap_context`).

Acceptance target:
- `POST /api/v1/auth/invite-login` returns token pair + user + `api_key`.
- Returned key is multi-group usable at runtime.
- Runtime no longer requires default group selection for this flow.
- Local-source deploy verify passes with real invite code happy-path.

comments.author: assistant
comments.text: No prior open beads issue existed in repo `sub2api` for this execution slice at time of lane creation, so there was nothing to close locally before opening this focused lane. This lane supersedes ad-hoc conversational execution and is now the execution source-of-truth together with docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-07-sub2api-multigroup-apikey-runtime-plan.md.

comments.author: assistant
comments.text: Closed as DONE after local execution completed the lane: multi-group API key persistence materialized via `api_key_groups`, invite-login response now returns `api_key` only, local-source deploy passed, happy-path invite-login verify passed with real unused codes, and antigravity/gemini runtime verify passed with `ANTIGRAVITY_GEMINI_OK` under `ANTIGRAVITY_USER_AGENT_VERSION=1.21.9`.

title: [sub2api] Vietnamese i18n relaunch with residual Chinese cleanup
description:
Focused execution lane for Sub2API frontend localization relaunch. Goal: add a real standalone `vi.ts`, translate based on Sub2API product context, and move residual runtime-visible Chinese or hardcoded UI copy into i18n.

Execution source-of-truth plan:
- docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-08-sub2api-vi-i18n-relaunch-plan.md

Audit state at lane creation:
1. Frontend currently has only `frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.ts` and `frontend/src/i18n/locales/zh.ts`.
2. No `vi.ts` exists yet.
3. Preliminary Han-character scan confirms residual Chinese literals still exist under `frontend/src`.
4. Current i18n bootstrap in `frontend/src/i18n/index.ts` supports only `en` and `zh`.

Hard rules:
- Do not import `en.ts` or `zh.ts` into `vi.ts` to bypass translation.
- `vi.ts` must be materialized as a real locale file.
- Translation must be contextual to Sub2API product UX, not literal word-by-word conversion.

Execution scope:
- Add Vietnamese locale foundation.
- Audit and clean residual Chinese / hardcoded user-facing literals.
- Keep runtime-visible copy fully i18n-backed where touched.
- Verify build/typecheck and perform a residual Chinese scan after patching.

Acceptance target:
- `frontend/src/i18n/locales/vi.ts` exists and contains real Vietnamese translations.
- No shortcut locale imports from `en.ts`/`zh.ts` into `vi.ts`.
- Residual runtime-visible Chinese copy is moved into i18n or removed.
- Frontend verification passes after localization changes.

comments.author: assistant
comments.text: Opened after auditing current frontend i18n state and confirming no remaining open local beads issue in repo `sub2api` for this new execution slice. This lane now serves as execution anchor for the Vietnamese i18n relaunch together with docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-08-sub2api-vi-i18n-relaunch-plan.md.
